title: 聖地遊禱系列 Holy Land Tour & Prayer Series

background.zh: 頻道需要高質素的旅遊祈禱特輯，以吸引並啟發觀眾。
background.en: The channel needed high-quality travel and prayer specials to engage and inspire its audience.

solution.zh: 全盤操刀《聖地遊禱系列》製作。透過細膩的畫面調色與流暢的剪接敘事，帶領觀眾身歷其境，有效提升 YouTube 頻道的視覺質感與內容深度。
solution.en: Spearheaded the production of the "Holy Land Tour & Prayer Series." Through meticulous color grading and fluid storytelling, we created an immersive viewing experience that elevated the channel's visual quality and content depth.

background.zh: 教會需要穩定的線上直播方案以連繫無法實體出席的會眾。
background.en: The church required a stable online broadcasting solution to connect with remote congregants.

solution.zh: 設立多鏡頭直播系統與專業音訊路由，確保每週崇拜順暢無阻。
solution.en: Set up a multi-camera live stream system with professional audio routing to ensure flawless weekly services.
